#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

std::vector<uint32_t> read_item_batch(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a buffer adaptor for the span
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Read the item_count using little-endian
    uint32_t item_count;
    hexi::endian::le le_count(item_count);
    adaptor.read(le_count);
    
    // Read the items into a vector
    std::vector<uint32_t> items;
    hexi::pmc::read_container(items, item_count);
    
    return items;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>
#include <stdexcept>

int32_t read_int32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path);
    if (buffer.error()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file");
    }
    
    int32_t value;
    buffer.read(&value);
    
    if (buffer.error()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to read int32_t from file");
    }
    
    return value;
}

float read_float_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path);
    if (buffer.error()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file");
    }
    
    float value;
    buffer.read(&value);
    
    if (buffer.error()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to read float from file");
    }
    
    return value;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    // Write the entire vector data to the buffer
    buffer.write(static_cast<const void*>(data.data()), data.size());
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    // Create a vector to store the read data
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_read);
    
    // Read the specified number of bytes from the buffer into the result vector
    buffer.read(static_cast<void*>(result.data()), bytes_to_read);
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    return writer.write_varint(value);
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    return static_cast<T>(reader.read_varint());
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<std::byte> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>> adaptor(buffer, hexi::init_empty_t{});
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor);

    encode_varint(writer, original_value);
    T decoded_value = decode_varint(reader);

    return decoded_value == original_value;
}
```

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    // Create a Hexi::Buffer to hold the data
    Hexi::Buffer buffer;

    // Create a BinaryStream to write to the buffer
    Hexi::BinaryStream stream(buffer);

    // Write the header
    stream << packet.header;

    // Write the data string (which will be written with a prefix)
    stream << packet.data;

    // Write 16 bytes of padding (0x00)
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);

    // Write the footer
    stream << packet.footer;

    // Now, we need to get the data from the buffer and return it as a vector.
    // We assume that the buffer has a data() method that returns a pointer to the underlying storage and a size() method.
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.data(), buffer.data() + buffer.size());
}
```

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    stream.write(hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id));
    for (const auto& value : packet.data_values) {
        stream.write(hexi::endian::native_to_big(value));
    }
    stream.write(hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum));

    return buffer;
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer_copy(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer_copy);
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(stream.read<uint32_t>());
    const uint32_t data_count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(stream.read<uint32_t>());
    packet.data_values.resize(data_count);
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < data_count; ++i) {
        packet.data_values[i] = hexi::endian::big_to_native(stream.read<uint16_t>());
    }
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(stream.read<uint32_t>());

    return packet;
}

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolHeader header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer_copy(buffer.begin(), buffer.end()));
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer_copy);
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    // Use span to get the first 4 bytes
    auto id_span = stream.span<uint32_t>(1);
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(*id_span.data());

    // Use skip to advance past the header (4 bytes)
    stream.skip(4);

    return header;
}
```
